programs.part_name: Adjustable Conveyor Side Guide Bracket - single metal part
programs.subcad_program:
from subcad import Stock

part = (
    Stock.rectangular(220, 65, 6, material="steel_a36")
    .drill(diameter=6, through=True, cx=-97, cy=-0.5, spot_drill=False)
    .drill(diameter=6, through=True, cx=97, cy=-0.5, spot_drill=False)
    .slot(length=73, width=8, through=True, cx=0, cy=-0.5)
    .pocket(length=55, width=21, depth=2, cx=0, cy=0, corner_radius=0)
    .chamfer(width=1)
)
coverage_notes: Base rectangular stock envelope 220 x 65 x 6 mm.
Two through mounting holes diameter 6 mm at X=13 and X=207, Y=32.
Central through obround slot 73 x 8 mm at X=110, Y=32.
Top relief pocket 55 x 21 x 2 mm centered between mounting holes.
Top outside chamfers represented with 1 mm chamfer operation.
known_gaps: 0.5 mm chamfers on individual hole and slot mouths are not separately selectable in this draft; only the general top chamfer is modeled.
review_notes: Draft generated directly from frozen Stage 2 requirement text; not executed or visually reviewed yet.
Coordinate conversion uses SubCAD centered stock coordinates while requirement text uses lower-left-near datum coordinates.

programs.part_name: Conveyor Roller End Bearing Housing - single metal part
programs.subcad_program:
from subcad import Stock

part = (
    Stock.cylindrical(57, 63, material="steel_a36")
    .turn_id(diameter=19, depth=63)
    .counterbore(hole_diameter=19, counterbore_diameter=29, counterbore_depth=3, through=True)
    .pocket(length=55, width=19, depth=6.84, cx=0, cy=0, corner_radius=0)
    .threaded_hole(diameter=5, depth=28.5, cx=-10.5, cy=0)
    .threaded_hole(diameter=5, depth=28.5, cx=10.5, cy=0)
    .slot(length=63, width=2, depth=57, through=True, cx=0, cy=-14.25)
    .chamfer(width=1.0)
)
coverage_notes: Base cylindrical stock OD 57 mm x length 63 mm.
Centered axial through bore diameter 19 mm through full length.
One concentric end counterbore diameter 29 mm x 3 mm deep represented.
Longitudinal top reference flat 19 mm wide over 55 mm represented as a top milled flat relief.
Two tapped M5 clamp holes at axial X=21 and X=42 represented on the top flat.
Full-length split relief slit 2 mm wide approximated as a through slot offset toward datum-B side.
Outside circular edge break represented with 1.0 mm chamfer operation.
known_gaps: Bore-mouth 1.0 mm chamfers on both ends are noted but not separately selectable on the internal bore edges in this draft.
Requirement calls for counterbores on both ends; this draft models the accessible top/end counterbore only.
True longitudinal flat on a round bar side is approximated with a top-face pocket/flat operation.
Radial hole axis and intersection with cylindrical bore are approximated using top-face threaded_hole placement.
Exact radial slit from OD to axial bore on the cylindrical side is approximated as a top-face through slot.
Internal bore-edge chamfers are not separately modeled.
review_notes: Draft generated directly from frozen Stage 2 requirement text; not executed or visually reviewed yet.
Coordinate conversion uses SubCAD centered stock coordinates while requirement text uses lower-left-near datum coordinates.

programs.part_name: Pallet Fork Entry Guide Shoe - single metal part
programs.subcad_program:

part = (
    Stock.rectangular(180, 80, 35, material="steel_a36")
    .drill(diameter=10, through=True, cx=-74, cy=0, spot_drill=False)
    .drill(diameter=10, through=True, cx=74, cy=0, spot_drill=False)
    .slot(length=60, width=8, through=True, cx=0, cy=0)
    .pocket(length=45, width=26, depth=15, cx=0, cy=0, corner_radius=0)
    .chamfer(width=1)

)

Angled reference region over the last 36 mm represented as a sloped top-face cut at the right end.

Exact external face angle of 40 degrees is approximated by a sloped pocket depth transition, not a full side-face reprofile.

)
